title: Printable Columns
excerpt: Being able to create a column that you can directly print from Monday. We produce a lot of different products and have the need to label what is being rolled through our machines.  Creating a google sheet export is redun…

posts.author: ESleep (Ryleigh Mahaffee)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to create a column that you can directly print from Monday. We produce a lot of different products and have the need to label what is being rolled through our machines. Creating a google sheet export is redundant as we just moved from there to Monday to consolidate the amount of Google sheets we use for every customer.

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hmm not sure what this is about could you provide some context to this new planned feature
